characters.appearance: Adult male, bald with a thick, dark beard. He has a medium to large build.
characters.wardrobe: Light grey t-shirt and white shorts initially, later changing to a white graphic t-shirt and black shorts.
characters.demeanor: Confident but slightly hesitant while speaking a new language, friendly and polite.

characters.appearance: Adult female with dark curly hair.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: I have a reservation... [I have a reservation...]
Character A says: under the name Anjali. [under the name Anjali.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hook shows the user practicing a real-world English phrase before a high-pressure situation.
- Establishes the relatable anxiety of speaking English at a fancy hotel.
- Sets up the payoff of successful communication.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
POV: जब receptionist को मेरी English समझ आ गयी 🤯
I have a reservation
under the name
Anjali.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: Absolutely, sir. [Absolutely, sir.]
Character A says: It's under my wife's name. [It's under my wife's name.]
Unknown speaker says: Is she joining you? [Is she joining you?]
Character A says: Yes, वो बाहर गाड़ी पार्क कर रही है। [Yes, she's outside parking the car.]
Character A says: I will pay by card. [I will pay by card.]
Unknown speaker says: Your English is very fluent, sir. [Your English is very fluent, sir.]
Character A says: Thank you, मैं रोज़ प्रैक्टिस कर रहा हूँ। [Thank you, I am practicing daily.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates a successful real-world interaction (hotel check-in) using English.
- Shows natural Hindi-English code-mixing typical of the target audience.
- Delivers the emotional payoff of being complimented on English fluency.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
POV: जब receptionist को मेरी English समझ आ गयी 🤯

scenes.scene_summary:
- Visual resolution showing the user relaxed and happy with his family.
- Reinforces the confidence and pride gained from the successful interaction.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: POV: जब receptionist को मेरी English समझ आ गयी 🤯

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: आज ही Supernova डाउनलोड करें, और कॉन्फिडेंस से English बोलना सीखें। [Download Supernova today, and learn to speak English with confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Clear call-to-action to download Supernova.
- Highlights the core value proposition of gaining confidence.
- Removes the competitor's 'free' claim to align with Supernova's premium model.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
आज ही Supernova डाउनलोड करें और English बोलना सीखें।
